text.title: App Store and Play Store Release Procedure
text.summary: End-to-end 5-step procedure to apply App Store and Play Store Release. Each step pairs typed input + bounded action + named output + decision-gate. Steps are sequential unless explicitly marked parallel.

step.name: freeze-build
step.action: Pick the build commit; tag in git; archive symbols.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: prepare-metadata
step.action: Localize metadata; verify screenshot dimensions; write reviewer notes.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: submit-and-await-review
step.action: Submit; respond to reviewer feedback within 24h.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: staged-rollout
step.action: Roll 1% → 10% → 50% → 100% with gate criteria (crash rate, rating delta).
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: post-release-watch
step.action: Watch crash rate, store rating, support tickets for 72h; trigger rollback if criteria breached.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

section.title: Failure handling
section.p: If a decision-gate blocks, do NOT proceed to the next step. Surface the blockage to the owner with the specific input that did not satisfy the gate. Resume only after the input is corrected.
